g.text: 智能决策层通过DQN+PER习得"按需订货"策略; 多体协同层基于CTDE+QMIX实现上下游信息共享;

text.style: font-size: 8.5px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #333333

g.text: 持续适应层引入EWC抑制灾难性遗忘。各层文献引用对应正文参考文献编号。

text.style: font-style: italic; font-size: 7.8px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #555555

g.text: Note: MAEA-HCDS follows the progressive causal chain of "Emotional Disturbance → Incentive Blockage → Collaborative Robustness → Continual Robustness".

text.style: font-style: italic; font-size: 7.8px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimHei', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #555555

g.text: Multi-Agent Coordination enables upstream-downstream information sharing via CTDE+QMIX; Continual Adaptation suppresses catastrophic forgetting via EWC.
